releases.title: Bug Fixes
features: Live tab now loads scores immediately when you open it, instead of getting stuck on 'Loading…' until you switch away and back

releases.title: Standings, Dark Mode & More
features: Conference standings on the Live tab — Big 12 (and NCHC hockey) tables with a sport picker
Ranked opponents now show poll badges (e.g. #6 Texas) in every view
Game modal: new Scoring tab with play-by-play scoring summaries
Head-to-head history vs each opponent — record and recent meetings in game details
My Sports: star your favorite sports and every visit starts filtered to them
Dark mode 🌙 — toggle in the header, or follows your device setting automatically
Buy tickets right from list cards on upcoming games
Sun Devils news headlines from ESPN on the Live tab
Team rosters for Football, Basketball, and Hockey from the standings widget

releases.title: Granular Notification Options
features: Bell now opens a menu to choose which alerts you want per game
Choose from: Game start (15 min before), Score updates, and Final score
Score update labels are sport-aware — shows 'Inning updates' for baseball/softball
Live score changes during games now trigger score update notifications

releases.title: Bug Fixes
features: Push subscription race condition fixed — bell subscriptions no longer silently drop
Final-score alerts no longer fire for pre-existing old games
Game-start alerts skip zero-subscriber games without marking them sent
Service worker pre-cache no longer lists versioned JS/CSS paths it can never match

releases.title: Countdown Improvements
features: Countdowns longer than 24 hours now show days (e.g. 3d 04h 22m 10s)

releases.title: Bug Fixes
features: Schedule view now refreshes correctly when switching tabs
Season auto-selects the most recent season even when no results are recorded yet

releases.title: Push Notifications & PWA
features: Install the app to your home screen for a native app experience
Schedule stays available offline after the first visit
Subscribe to individual games with the bell icon
Get notified 15 minutes before tip-off
Receive final score alerts when games end — even with the app closed
Background score polling keeps results current automatically
